title: Netafim India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Netafim India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Netafim India has an exciting opening for a Quality Control Engineer at our Bhubaneswar office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Netafim India:
Netafim India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Quality Control

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Netafim India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
